title: Marathon Digital Holdings Bitcoin Production Updates November 2023
text: Marathon Digital Holdings announced bitcoin production and mining operation updates for November 2023. The company produced 1,187 BTC in November 2023. Marathon increased its domestic energized hash rate 20% to 23.1 exahashes as energization of the facility in Garden City, Texas was completed. As of November 30, 2023, the company held a total of 14,025 unrestricted BTC. Marathon's mining operations continued to expand with improved hash rate and production metrics. The company mined 12,852 bitcoins in 2023, more than tripling its mining output from 4,144 BTC in 2022.
